message:
Running command: echo "=== Check for real Python/librelane process ==="
ps aux | grep -E "python.*librelane|librelane.*python" | grep -v grep | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Check LR PID 214817 ==="
ps -p 214817 2>/dev/null && echo "still alive" || echo "EXITED"

echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis netlist confirmed ==="
SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"
ls -lh "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v.json 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== state_out.json from synthesis step ==="
cat "$SYNTH_DIR/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "No state_out yet"

message.content: The user's message ("We need to synthesize all the RTL underneath the verilog/RTL") is a re-statement of the goal. Looking at where things stand: synthesis is **complete** (16 MB netlist written, 90,977 cells, 0 errors) but LibreLane appears to have lost its process after the pipe deadlock incident. I need to restart LibreLane from the post-synthesis floorplan step.

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
echo "=== Check for real Python/librelane process ==="
ps aux | grep -E "python.*librelane|librelane.*python" | grep -v grep | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Check LR PID 214817 ==="
ps -p 214817 2>/dev/null && echo "still alive" || echo "EXITED"

echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis netlist confirmed ==="
SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"
ls -lh "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v.json 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== state_out.json from synthesis step ==="
cat "$SYNTH_DIR/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "No state_out yet"
args.thought: The user's message ("We need to synthesize all the RTL underneath the verilog/RTL") is a re-statement of the goal. Looking at where things stand: synthesis is **complete** (16 MB netlist written, 90,977 cells, 0 errors) but LibreLane appears to have lost its process after the pipe deadlock incident. I need to restart LibreLane from the post-synthesis floorplan step.
